problem_statement: Mullu Control Plane now has temporal scheduler receipts and distributed lease execution receipts, but it lacks an explicit Foundation Mode handoff that binds those receipts to future worker runtime receipt obligations. Without that handoff, a future worker path could conflate scheduler lease readiness with worker invocation authority, skip WorkerFailureReceipt obligations, or claim terminal closure without effect reconciliation.
success_criteria: SchedulerWorkerRuntimeReceiptHandoff binds temporal scheduler receipt refs, distributed lease execution receipt refs, worker mesh refs, worker failure receipt refs, and Universal Action Orchestration refs

The handoff records required admission gates for temporal scheduler lease evidence, distributed lease execution readiness, UAO effect admission, Phi_gov dispatch authorization, worker runtime receipt emission, WorkerFailureReceipt on error, and effect reconciliation before terminal closure

The handoff denies scheduler dispatch, runtime dispatch, worker invocation, scheduler mutation, lease backend calls, adapter backend calls, external network, filesystem writes, connector authority, terminal closure, and success claims

The validator rejects authority drift, missing source refs, missing admission gates, missing runtime witnesses, missing schema refs, admission drift, result drift, receipt ref drift, and contract summary count drift
The handoff schema is indexed in the governance protocol manifest and included in proof coverage matrix witnesses
No live worker dispatch, scheduler mutation, backend call, connector call, deployment, or production readiness claim is introduced
constraints: handoff validation must remain deterministic and non-live
temporal scheduler and distributed lease execution receipt refs must remain bound
WorkerFailureReceipt must be required for failed or partial worker dispatch
scheduler mutation and worker invocation flags must remain false
terminal closure must remain blocked until runtime receipt and effect reconciliation evidence exist
evidence_required: focused scheduler worker handoff validator receipt
standalone SDLC requirement and design validation receipt
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
